ddls:
CREATE TABLE "politicians" (
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each politician */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the politician */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the politician */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the politician belongs to */,
  "industry_connected" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the politician has industry connections */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the politician */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the politician */,
  "position" TEXT /* Current political position of the politician */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Start date of the current term */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of the current term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("politician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_politicians_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the party headquarters */,
  "political_orientation" TEXT /* Political orientation of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the industry belongs */,
  "annual_revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the industry */,
  "number_of_companies" INTEGER /* Number of companies in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "politician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the politician */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., financial, personal) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the connection */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the connection */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_connections_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_connections_politician_id FOREIGN KEY ("politician_id") REFERENCES politicians ("politician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connection_types" (
  "connection_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection type */,
  "connection_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the connection type */,
  "connection_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the connection type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the connection type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher of the team */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the team's project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher joined the team */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the data */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., document, spreadsheet) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who authored the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., analytical, summary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "notification_name" TEXT /* Name of the notification */,
  "notification_description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_recipients" (
  "notification_recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification recipient */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_recipients_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_recipients_notification_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_id") REFERENCES notifications ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_recipients_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
